_components.$content:
Plasma weapons are powerful, but short-ranged energy weapons. Like most energy weapons, they inflict more total damage, do not inflict Bleeding Wounds, and have reduced Armour Penetration, but have exceptional Armour Destruction for their size.

Plasma weapons tend to destabilize quickly in atmosphere, resulting in very short optimal ranges and a more rapid accuracy/damage dropoff than ballistic weapons. However, they have somewhat improved ammo economy over lasers, and have a high chance of starting fires wherever they hit.

This plasma rifle has a range dropoff of 12.5% (ballistics are 10%), and a 65% chance of setting a tile ablaze.
